basic_details.job_title: CSIR SERC Trade & Technician Apprentices Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 29 Posts
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-Structural Engineering Research Centre (CSIR-SERC), Chennai has published Notification No. SE-1/2026 dated 08 May 2026 for engagement of ITI Trade Apprentices and Technician (Diploma) Apprentices. A total of 16 ITI and 13 Diploma apprenticeship positions are available in various trades. The walk-in interview is scheduled on 20 May 2026. Interested candidates who have registered on the Apprenticeship Portal (Apprenticeship India / NATS) may appear for the walk-in interview as per the schedule.

age_limit.details: ITI Apprentices: Minimum 14 years Technician (Diploma) Apprentices: 18 to 24 years (as on date of interview) | Age Relaxation: | 5 years for SC/ST 3 years for OBC (NCL) Up to 10 years for PwD (additional for SC/ST/OBC)

qualification.details: Essential Qualification | ITI Apprentices: ITI Pass in relevant trade (NCVT pattern) Diploma Apprentices: Diploma in relevant Engineering/Technology discipline | Other Eligibility Requirements | Technician (Diploma) candidates who passed in 2022/2023/2024/2025 only Must have registered on Apprenticeship Portal (Apprenticeship India / NATS) Candidates should not have undergone/presently undergoing apprenticeship elsewhere No prior job experience of one year or more

selection_process: Walk-in Interview on 20.05.2026 Shortlisting (if number of candidates is large) based on merit/criteria decided by Selection Committee Verification of original documents
how_to_apply: Register on the respective Apprenticeship Portal: ITI: https://www.apprenticeshipindia.org Diploma: https://nats.education.gov.in
Fill the application form available on CSIR-SERC website
Appear for Walk-in Interview on 20.05.2026 at 09:00 AM with all original documents and self-attested copies
important_instructions: Engagement is purely for apprenticeship training (01 Year). No obligation for permanent employment after completion of training. Accommodation available on twin sharing basis at nominal charge. Bring original Aadhaar Card and all relevant certificates. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature. Final year students and sandwich/private diplomas are not eligible.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in CSIR-SERC Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: CSIR-Structural Engineering Research Centre (CSIR-SERC), Chennai has announced a total of 29 apprenticeship vacancies under Advertisement No. SE-1/2026. Out of these, 16 vacancies are available for ITI Trade Apprentices and 13 vacancies are for Technician (Diploma) Apprentices in different engineering and technical trades.

faq.question: Q2. What is the date of the walk-in interview for CSIR-SERC Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for CSIR-SERC Apprentice Recruitment 2026 will be conducted on 20 May 2026. Candidates must report at the venue between 09:00 AM and 11:30 AM along with original certificates, self-attested copies, Aadhaar card, and other required documents for verification and interview process.

faq.question: Q3. Which trades are available under CSIR-SERC ITI Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The ITI apprenticeship vacancies are available in trades such as Electrician, Electronics Mechanic, Mechanic Refrigeration & Air Conditioning, Draughtsman (Civil), Wireman, Plumber, PASAA/COPA, Welder, and Mason. Candidates must possess ITI qualification in the relevant trade under NCVT pattern to become eligible for these positions.

faq.question: Q4. What qualifications are required for CSIR-SERC Diploma Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for Technician (Diploma) Apprentice posts should possess a Diploma in relevant Engineering or Technology disciplines such as Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, or Electronics & Communication Engineering from recognized institutions.

faq.question: Q5. What stipend is offered under CSIR-SERC Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected ITI Trade Apprentices will receive a monthly stipend of ₹10,500/- during the one-year apprenticeship training period. Technician (Diploma) Apprentices will receive ₹12,000/- per month as stipend according to apprenticeship rules and guidelines applicable to CSIR-SERC Chennai.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for CSIR-SERC Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For ITI Apprentice posts, the minimum age required is 14 years. For Technician (Diploma) Apprentice posts, candidates should be between 18 and 24 years of age as on the interview date. Age relaxation is available for SC, ST, OBC, and PwD candidates as per Government of India apprenticeship rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for CSIR-SERC Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of a walk-in interview along with verification of original documents. If a large number of candidates appear for the interview, shortlisting may also be done based on merit or criteria decided by the Selection Committee before final selection.

faq.question: Q8. Is registration on Apprenticeship Portal mandatory for CSIR-SERC Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, all candidates must register on the appropriate apprenticeship portal before attending the walk-in interview. ITI candidates need to register on the Apprenticeship India portal, while Diploma candidates must register through the NATS portal to become eligible for apprenticeship engagement.
